message:
feat(scheduler): add NUMA-aware hugepage slab allocator and enrich reactor mesh telemetry

Introduces a hugepage-backed slab allocation subsystem for extension hot
paths, with graceful fallback when hugepages are unavailable:

- HugepageConfig/HugepageStatus: evaluate system hugepage availability
  from /proc and degrade to standard allocation with explicit fallback
  reason codes (Disabled, DetectionUnavailable, InsufficientHugepages,
  AlignmentMismatch)
- NumaSlabPool: per-NUMA-node slab pool that attempts hugepage-backed
  mmap with MAP_HUGETLB, falling back to regular allocation transparently
- Extend ReactorMeshTelemetry with shard_bindings (per-shard core/NUMA
  mapping) and fallback_reason for placement diagnostics
- Add as_json() method on ReactorMeshTelemetry for machine-readable
  diagnostics output
- Promote placement_manifest() to const fn

This supports upcoming work on NUMA-locality-aware extension dispatch
where slab allocations should be placed near the reactor shards that
will consume them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
